channel.title: KV Cache on Xieydd's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in KV Cache on Xieydd's Blog

item.title: From KV Cache to AI Memory System: The Evolution of Large Language Model Inference Architecture
item.author: xieydd@gmail.com (xieydd)
item.description: From KV Cache to AI Memory System: The Evolution of Large Language Model Inference Architecture Abstract This article addresses a seemingly dispersed but fundamentally unified question: Why has systems innovation around large language model inference over the past two years increasingly looked less like “optimizing a neural network” and more like “designing a memory system”? If we characterize pre-2023 LLM engineering as “racing for FLOPS, Tensor Core utilization, and training throughput,” then the 2024–2026 narrative of inference has clearly shifted to another主线: KV cache, TTFT/TPOT, continuous batching, prefix reuse, prefill/decode disaggregation, hierarchical cache, CXL memory pool.
